name: Kira Systems AI Contract Analysis API
what_it_does: Kira Systems REST API for AI-powered contract analysis and due diligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage contract and legal document upload and ML-powered clause extraction, handle 1,000+ pre-trained smart field extraction for common contract provisions, access custom field training for organization-specific clause and term identification, retrieve contract risk flagging and deviation from standard terms detection, manage due diligence project organization and document set management, handle side-by-side contract comparison and redlining data, access bulk contract portfolio analysis for M&A due diligence, retrieve contract metadata extraction including parties, dates, and key terms, manage contract comparison against organization playbooks, and integrate extracted contract data with CLM, CRM, and legal workflow platforms.
use_cases: Extracting key clauses from contracts during M&A due diligence from legal agents
Flagging non-standard terms from contract review agents
Building contract portfolios from CLM integration agents
Comparing contract terms against playbook from legal operations agents
not_for: Contract drafting and generation without clause extraction and analysis focus
General document management without contract intelligence and legal analytics
Consumer legal tools without enterprise due diligence and M&A scale
best_when: A law firm or corporate legal team using Kira wants AI agents to automate contract clause extraction, due diligence analysis, risk flagging, and CLM/legal platform integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: AI contract analysis augments but does not replace licensed attorney review — extracted clauses and risk flags require lawyer interpretation before legal decisions. Custom field training on small sample sets has high error rates; validate custom extractions against holdout test sets. M&A due diligence findings from AI tools require attorney certification before transaction reliance.

auth.notes: Kira Systems uses API key authentication. Per-organization API credentials. Acquired by Litera (2021). REST API for document ingestion and extraction result retrieval. No native webhooks — polling-based processing status. Documentation available to enterprise customers. On-premises and cloud deployment options. 1,000+ pre-trained smart fields for common legal provisions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; document volume and user count determine pricing
pricing.notes: Toronto, Canada. Founded 2012. Acquired by Litera (2021). AI-powered contract analysis market pioneer. Used by top global law firms and Fortune 500 legal teams. 1,000+ pre-trained provisions covering common legal contract types. Known for M&A due diligence acceleration. Competes with Luminance and Evisort for AI contract analysis market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk processing via project queue

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: AI contract extraction requires attorney review before legal decision-making; do not automate contract risk decisions without licensed legal professional review
Litera acquisition — Kira is now part of Litera legal technology platform; API and product roadmap evolving; verify current API availability and support
No webhooks — implement polling for document processing completion; extraction latency is minutes to hours for large document sets
Customer documentation — API documentation requires active enterprise customer relationship; limited public API reference
Custom field training — custom extraction models require 50+ labeled contract examples per field; validate against test set before production use
Project-based workflow — due diligence work is organized in projects; API operations are scoped to project and document set hierarchy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal contract analysis. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. CA/US/EU. Legal contract and due diligence document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal AI contract analysis. SOC2, ISO27001. API key. CA/US/EU. M&A due diligence and contract data.
